info.name: EventsHub API
info.description:
Auto-generated collection for the eventsHub Express API.

Conventions:
- Auth uses the `x-auth-token` header (NOT `Authorization: Bearer`), matching middleware/auth.js. Set the `token` variable after logging in.
- Sub-user routes use `x-auth-token: {{subUserToken}}`.
- Password-reset routes (update-password, verify-otp/forget-password) use the id token returned by forget-password -> `{{idToken}}`.
- All routes are mounted under `/api/...` (not `/api/v1`).
- `{{baseUrl}}` is the host only (e.g. http://localhost:8080).

The 'Unmounted / Not Registered' folder contains route files that exist in the repo but are NOT registered in startup/routes.js, so they are not reachable on the running server. Their path prefixes are best-guess placeholders.

request.description: Login as an admin user. Returns a JWT token.
Social login/registration. Handled by POST /:type? when type === 'social-login'.
Sends a verification code and returns an id token (use as {{idToken}}).
Uses the password-reset id token (passwordauth middleware).
Admin only. status enum: online | deleted | deactivated.

body.raw:
{
  "images": ["https://example.com/event1.jpg"],
  "name": "Summer Music Festival",
  "event_type": "concert",
  "start_Date": "2026-08-15T18:00:00.000Z",
  "start_Time": "2026-08-15T18:00:00.000Z",
  "address": "National Stadium, Kingston",
  "country": "Jamaica",
  "city": "Kingston",
  "state": "Kingston",
  "description": "An unforgettable night of live music.",
  "join_people": 500,
  "ticket_plans": [
    { "type": "general", "price": 50, "totalTicket": 300, "offers": [], "isinstallment": false, "installmentPlans": [], "addOns": [] },
    { "type": "vip", "price": 120, "totalTicket": 200, "offers": [], "isinstallment": false, "installmentPlans": [], "addOns": [] }
  ],
  "refund_policy": "Full refund up to 7 days before the event.",
  "category": "{{categoryId}}",
  "type": "paid",
  "location": { "type": "Point", "coordinates": [-76.5320, 18.0179] },
  "supplierid": "{{supplierId}}"
}

request.description: type enum: free | paid. ticket_plans[].type: general | vip | vvip | earlybird. supplierid is optional (admin-on-behalf).
optionalAuth. Many optional filters; address requires lat & lng.
No auth. Uses a hard-coded test card payload internally; body is ignored.

body.raw:
{
  "name": "Summer Music Festival (Updated)",
  "description": "Updated description with new lineup.",
  "images": ["https://example.com/event1.jpg"],
  "event_type": "concert",
  "start_Date": "2026-08-16T18:00:00.000Z",
  "start_Time": "2026-08-16T18:00:00.000Z",
  "address": "National Stadium, Kingston",
  "country": "Jamaica",
  "city": "Kingston",
  "state": "Kingston",
  "join_people": 600,
  "ticket_plans": [ { "type": "general", "price": 55, "totalTicket": 350 } ],
  "refund_policy": "Full refund up to 5 days before the event.",
  "location": { "type": "Point", "coordinates": [-76.5320, 18.0179] },
  "type": "paid"
}

request.description: Returns a sub-user token; set it as {{subUserToken}}.
NOTE: in subUserRoutes.js this route is declared as 'generate-sub-user-token/:id' WITHOUT a leading slash, so it may not resolve as expected on the server. Included here with the intended path.
multipart/form-data with field name 'image'. Returns a public URL.
Server-rendered HTML page for an event.

item.name: Unmounted / Not Registered
item.description: These route files exist in the repo but are NOT registered in startup/routes.js, so they are not reachable on the running server. Path prefixes below are best-guess placeholders based on each file's likely mount point.
